meta.title: CaseBoard | Case-file project board
meta.description: A graph-based project management service for connecting tasks, bugs, people, and events as clue cards

home.title: Track project evidence like an investigation.
home.description: CaseBoard lets you place tasks, bugs, people, and events on an investigation-style board, then connect their relationships to understand project flow.
home.featureEditorDesc: Create, move, and connect clue cards on a React Flow powered board.
home.featureAnalysisDesc: Detect unlinked clues, critical clues, suspicious links, and type statistics automatically.
home.featureI18nDesc: Switch UI copy through separated translation files.

auth.name: Name
auth.required: Please fill in the required fields.

boards.title: Case Archive
boards.subtitle: Create project case files and manage investigation boards.
boards.empty: No case files have been created yet.
boards.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this case file.

editor.empty: No clues have been recorded yet.
editor.emptyHint: Add clue cards to track the flow of this project.

mypage.subtitle: Review your account and case file statistics.
